title: Week 11 Overview
html:
Week 11 Overview

Day 51
1. Use of verb in plain form + し、verb in plain form + し、…  to list several actions or things
2. Grammar focus on the use of 一生懸命 (いっしょうけんめい) and それに
3. Three new kanji: 朝, 昼, 夜

Day 52
1. How to use verb in ます form + ながら + another verb in ます form to express doing two things simultaneously
2. Use of noun + という + noun, to say “called”, “named”
3. Grammar focus on ながら and ゆっくり
4. Katakana for food (second part)

Day 53
1. How to use verb in て form + おきます to express doing something in advance or leaving something undone
2. How to use もう + verb in て form + あります to express a preparation done in advance and completed
3. Grammar focus in 十分 (じゅうぶん), いよいよ, そのほかに
4. Three new kanji: 晩, 町, 英

Day 54
1. How to use verb in て form + verb in ます to express a sequence of actions
2. How to use verb in ない form + で + verb in ます to express an alternative
3. Grammar focus on the use of って
4. Katakana for clothes (second part)

Day 55
1. How to use verb in て form + しまいました to express regret of something done
2. Grammar focus on the use of で with quantitative limit
3. Grammar focus on the use of さっき
4. Three new kanji 語, 間, 安
